text_snippet: I. Everyone has the right to receive qualified legal assistance. II. In cases specified by law, legal help shall be rendered free at the expense of the State. III. Everyone from the moment of being de

article_id: Article 62. Prohibition of Changes of Court Jurisdiction
text_snippet: Everyone has the right to have his or her case considered in a court specified by law. It is prohibited to have the case considered in another court without his or her consent.

article_id: Article 63. Presumption of Innocence
text_snippet: I. Everyone has the right to the presumption of innocence. Everyone who is charged with a crime shall be considered innocent until his or her guilt has been proven in the procedure specified by law, a

article_id: Article 64. Inadmissibility of Repeated Conviction for the Same Crime
text_snippet: No one shall be convicted repeatedly for the same crime.

article_id: Article 65. Right of Repeated Appeal to Court
text_snippet: Everyone has the right to appeal to a higher court for reconsideration of the verdict passed with respect to him in the procedure specified by law as well as appeal for pardon and for mitigating the p

article_id: Article 66. Inadmissibility of Forced Testifying Against Relatives
text_snippet: No one can be forced to testify against himself, wife (husband), children, parents, brother, sister. A complete list of relatives against whom testifying is not obligatory is determined by law.

article_id: Article 67. Rights of the Detained, Arrested, and Accused of a Crime
text_snippet: I. Everyone who has been detained, arrested, accused of a crime on the part of competent State organs must be given immediate explanation of his or her rights and the reason for being arrested and bro

article_id: Article 68. The right to protection against arbitrariness and being treated with dignity
text_snippet: I. Everyone has the right to being treated by public bodies with dignity that rules out arbitrariness. II. The rights of a person who has been a victim of a crime and abuse of power shall be protected

article_id: Article 69. Rights of Foreign Citizens and Persons without Citizenship
text_snippet: I. Foreign citizens and persons without citizenship when in the Republic of Azerbaijan can enjoy all rights and freedoms and shall fulfill all the obligations together with citizens of the Republic of

article_id: Article 7. The Azerbaijan State
text_snippet: I. The Azerbaijan State is a democratic, law-governed, secular, unitary republic. II. The Republic of Azerbaijan sovereign power in internal matters is confined to legal rules, while in international

article_id: Article 70. Right to Political Asylum
text_snippet: I. According to the universal international legal norms the Republic of Azerbaijan grants political asylum to foreign citizens and persons without citizenship. II. Extradition to another State of pers

article_id: Article 71. Protection of Human rights and civil liberties
text_snippet: I. The legislative, executive and judicial powers shall observe and protect human rights and freedoms fixed in the Constitution. II. No one can curtail the implementation of the rights and freedoms of

article_id: Article 72. Principal Obligations of Citizens
text_snippet: I. Everyone has responsibilities towards the State and society which result directly from his or her rights and freedoms. Duties may be established for anyone only by this Constitution or by law. II.

article_id: Article 73. Taxes and Other State Duties
text_snippet: I. Everyone has the responsibility to pay taxes and other State dues imposed by the law in full and without delay. II. No one can be forced to pay taxes and other State dues over and above the amount

article_id: Article 74. Loyalty to the Homeland
text_snippet: I. Loyalty to the Homeland is sacred. II. Persons employed by election or appointment in the legislative, executive and judicial organs bear responsibility for proper and accurate implementation of th

article_id: Article 75. Respect for State Symbols
text_snippet: I. Every citizen must respect the State Symbols of the Republic of Azerbaijan-its Flag, Emblem and National Anthem. II. Expression of disrespect to the state symbols shall entail liability as determin

article_id: Article 76. Defense of the Homeland
text_snippet: I. The Defense of the Homeland is the duty of every citizen. Citizens shall serve in the Armed Forces in accordance with the conditions specified by law. II. If serving in the Armed Forces runs counte

article_id: Article 77. Protection of Historical and Cultural Monuments
text_snippet: To protect historical and cultural monuments is the duty of everyone.

article_id: Article 78. Environmental Protection
text_snippet: Protection of the environment is the duty of everyone.

article_id: Article 79. Prohibition to Execute Responsibilities Contradicting the Law
text_snippet: No one can be compelled to execute responsibilities contradicting the Constitution and the laws of the Republic of Azerbaijan.

article_id: Article 8. The Head of the Azerbaijan State
text_snippet: I. The President is the Head of the Republic of Azerbaijan. He represents the Azerbaijan State in home and foreign policies. II. The President of the Republic of Azerbaijan embodies the unity of the A

article_id: Article 80. Responsibility
text_snippet: Violation of the present Constitution and the laws of the Republic of Azerbaijan as well as abuse of rights and freedoms and failure to fulfill responsibilities specified by the present Constitution a

article_id: Article 81. Authority Competent to Exercise Legislative Power
text_snippet: The legislative power is exercised by the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan.

article_id: Article 82. Composition of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: The Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan consists of 125 Deputies.

article_id: Article 83. Principles for the Elections to the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: The Members of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan are elected on the basis of majority voting in general, equal and direct elections by way of free, individual and secret voting.

article_id: Article 84. Term of Office for Members of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: I. The term of the office of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan is five years. In case the conduct of elections to the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan cannot be held due to mili

article_id: Article 85. Requirements of Candidates for Deputy of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: I. Every citizen of the Republic of Azerbaijan with the right to participation in election can be elected a Deputy of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan in the procedure determined by law.

article_id: Article 86. Certification and Confirmation of Election Results
text_snippet: The election results shall be verified and confirmed by the Constitutional Court of the Republic of Azerbaijan.

article_id: Article 87. Expiration of Term of Office of the Deputies
text_snippet: I. The term of office of the Members of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan expires on the day of the first sitting of the newly elected Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan. II. The

article_id: Article 88. Sessions of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: I. Every year, Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan holds two regular, spring and autumn, sessions. The first session of Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan is called no later than one we

article_id: Article 89. Termination of the Mandate of a Deputy of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan and Loss of Powers
text_snippet: I. The powers of a Deputy of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan are terminated in the following cases: the wrong counting of votes during the elections has been established; the citizenshi

article_id: Article 9. The Armed Forces
text_snippet: I. The Republic of Azerbaijan establishes the Armed Forces to ensure its security and protection. The Armed Forces are composed of the Azerbaijan army and other armed formations. II. The Republic of A

article_id: Article 90. The Immunity of the Deputy of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: I. The Deputy of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan during the term of office has personal immunity. With the exception of cases when he has been caught in flagrante delicto, the Deputy du

article_id: Article 91. Immunity from Prosecution of Members of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan Answerable
text_snippet: The Members of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan may not be prosecuted for their activity in the Milli Majlis, voting in the Milli Majlis and ideas expressed in the Milli Majlis. Concerni

article_id: Article 92. Organization of the Work of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: The Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan shall determine its rules of procedure and establish its bodies, including the election of its Speaker and the Deputy Speakers, the organization of commi

article_id: Article 93. Acts of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: I. The Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan shall adopt constitutional laws, laws and resolutions on matters within its competence. II. Constitutional laws, laws and resolutions shall be adopted

article_id: Article 94. General Rules to be Determined by the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: I. The Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan determines the general rules on the following matters: the use of human and civil constitutional rights and freedoms, State guarantee of these rights

article_id: Article 95. Matters to be Determined by the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: I. The Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan is competent to determine the following matters: the arrangement of the work of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan; the establishment of d

article_id: Article 96. The Right to Initiate Legislation in the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: I. The right to initiate legislation (the right to submit draft laws and other issues to the discussion of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan) in the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerba

article_id: Article 97. Time limit for the Submission of Laws to the President for Signing
text_snippet: I. The laws are submitted to the President of the Republic of Azerbaijan for signing within 14 days from the day of adoption. II. A draft law which has been declared urgent is submitted to the Preside

article_id: Article 98-1. The dissolution of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: I. The President of the Republic of Azerbaijan is empowered to dissolve the Milli Majlis if the same convocation of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan expresses twice during the year no-co

article_id: Article 98. Coming into Force of Laws of the Milli Majlis of the Republic of Azerbaijan
text_snippet: The law and the resolutions shall come into effect from the day of publication if the law or the resolution itself does not specify a different procedure.

article_id: Article 99. Authority Competent to Exercise Executive Power
text_snippet: The executive power in the Republic of Azerbaijan belongs to the President of the Republic of Azerbaijan.
